name: Shigematsu Works Co., Ltd.
summary: Shigematsu Works Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells personal protective equipment, instruments, chemicals, and chemicals related to disaster prevention in Japan and internationally. The company offers dustproof masks, breathing protection equipment with electric fan, gas masks, air supply masks, air/oxygen respirators, soundproof protective equipment, protective glasses, protective clothing, protective gloves, safety belts, stretchers, oximeters, etc. It serves textile, chemical, petroleum, automobile, machinery, electricity, gas, steel, shipbuilding, heavy equipment, fishery, mining, transportation, warehousing, construction, civil engineering, and food industries, as well as government agencies. Shigematsu Works Co., Ltd. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
